title: Normalized Staging Record
description: Adapter output for the controlled manual live-test workflow (Scope E). A staging record is a candidate-level normalized observation with provenance; it is never written to data/candidates/latest.json, data/reviewed/**, or dashboard/public/data/** directly, and it never carries an inferred operational logistics impact. source_signal preserves source-native classifications (e.g. a GDACS alert level or a CAP severity/certainty/urgency triple) as a hazard/context signal only, kept separate from any platform severity or impact field.

source_external_id.description: Stable source-native identifier. For GDACS this is the composite 'eventtype:eventid'; for CAP/TMD this is the CAP <identifier>.

source_revision.description: Episode/revision/message-reference identity, kept separate from source_external_id (e.g. GDACS episodeid, or a CAP <references> value for Update/Cancel messages).

source_publication_time.description: The source's own publication/sent timestamp (e.g. GDACS fromdate/todate/datetime, or CAP <sent>), not the retrieval time.

candidate_identity_inputs.description: The controlled fields a later, human-reviewed promotion step would pass to collectors.event_identity.resolve_event_identity. This staging record does not itself assign a canonical_event_id.

source_signal.description: Source-native hazard/context classification, e.g. {"source_alert_level": "Orange"} for GDACS or {"severity": "Severe", "certainty": "Likely", "urgency": "Immediate"} for CAP. Never a platform impact-severity value.

field_mapping_notes.description: Short notes documenting which raw source field each normalized field came from, and any transformation applied.
